name: Raisin Peanut Butter Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the sugar and shortening until smooth.
2. Add peanut butter, eggs, raisins, and evaporated milk to the mixture. Mix well.
3. Sift flour, baking powder, salt, and vanilla into a separate bowl.
4. Gradually add the sifted ingredients to the creamed mixture. Stir thoroughly to combine.
5. Shape the dough into small balls (about 1 teaspoon each) and place them on an oiled baking sheet.
6. Bake in a moderate oven (400°F/200°C) for 12 minutes, or until lightly golden brown.
7. Allow cookies to cool on the baking sheet for a few minutes before removing.
Martha Mathews
Fresno, CA
